summary: Made surgical seam edits to strengthen the carryover from chapter 9's signed affidavit into the church-supper opening and to smooth the chapter's exit without changing scene beats or causality.
edits: Clarified in the opening that Della has put her name against her son's, tightening continuity with the prior chapter's affidavit scene.
Removed a repeated action beat near the close so the exit reads cleaner while preserving the same emotional and narrative handoff.
